audience: creative professionals, 28-40, value craft over logos
aesthetic: quiet luxury with a raw, hand-finished edge
signature: exposed hand-linked seams and undyed natural fibres
palette: bone, oat, charcoal, faded oxblood; heavy merino, undyed alpaca, dry cotton
inspirations: early Jil Sander, The Row, 1990s Prada, Japanese boro textiles
differentiator: knitwear treated like tailoring — structured, architectural, seasonless
